reviews.review_title: Fun Times with room for Improvements.
reviews.review_description:
My main issue is calibration. ￼There was a previous review that mentioned “hands going through the blocks”. That is correct. I’ve played rounds multiple times, as there’s only a limited number of tracks in the demo, and I would hit the same note but get different results at times, even having my hands go through the blocks when they should have registered. 

My other concern is that I hope the full version will have the ability to remove certain obstructions or at least offer different levels of difficulty. Again, all in regards to the accuracy of hitting these blocks and dodging, etc.. 

The game is extremely enjoyable otherwise, with immersive visuals to complement. ￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the feedback; it really helped us identify an issue with the collision detection that occurred with certain playstyles. We’ve since fixed it in the demo and made sure it was properly addressed for the full game launch.

We’ve also added a new menu in the song selection screen that lets you disable blocks or dodges.

Sorry for the late reply!

Best,
Lucas

reviews.review_description: I play rhythm games and I just discovered this, it's really fun! I just wish they had a real game. What happened?!

I love 2 out of 3-4 songs that I managed to unlock. But it's been really difficult. I find that the music and rhythm is important for me and because of that I wanted to keep playing the few songs available. Here's hoping the full game has more songs like that...

But when it comes to playing, that was a real challenge too. Eventually I realized that I couldn't follow the song or else I'd keep missing when it felt right. I also realized some punches wouldn't land regardless... so it gets really frustrating especially when you feel the song and are so into it. I hope they fix the issues with the game and that I can test the trial fully.

reviews.review_title: Nice game and easy to learn.
reviews.review_description:
It has great musics and nice tutorials. So, I really enjoyed it but there was some stuffs can be improved.

1. If it has MR mode, it will be better because I played it in small room and kept bump everwoods. when I tried to avoid red nodes.

2. Somehow it was really hard to avoid red nodes. I almost bent my body left and right 90 degrees, but still I was hit by them :(

But still, it's good game and cuz it's demo, I think there will be lots of improvement in the future.

I like the game and the music. There were some lags when punching. Sometimes the game didn't capture. It provides some good exercise while having fun. I am not sure how to unlock the other areas. I also did not know what to do when I saw the ladder. Is it like the other item where you duck? Thank you.
I wish I could unlock more songs.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words, Mom.vie! Just wanted to let you know that the full game, now with new tracks and modes, is officially available!

reviews.review_description: This game will get your body moving for sure! I wish there was a way that you could slow down the pace a little bit for somebody who is just starting out. There's no setting for that. I can't wait until the full game comes out. Sending a shout out to the devs on this one. Keep it the good work, guys.👋😎

I tried the initial learning part. It’s not clear if they want you to use hand controllers or just your hands. I tried with controllers. A lot of the punching doesn’t work - weird tracking? Then comes the rock you have to avoid. It comes on the wrong side and destroys you. You eventually get it. Then comes the stuff you have to hit up. You sort of get it and then one of those things literally falls of your head and kills you. 
I cannot pass the instructions!! I tried it about 20 times and gave up. 
It’s a great idea but it’s not done well. 
I’d love someone from the game to respond and tell me what  missing - maybe I am missing something. 
I said  that I was left handed. Maybe that did it?

reviews.review_title: After 1 year, app can't be purchased
reviews.review_description: After 1 year, app still can't be purchased. Dev closed shop??

developer_response.body: It took us a while to have everything in shape, but finally, Beat the Beats is out!

reviews.review_description: If you want to learn how to flip around like a crazy t-rex, unlock that skateboard level
Can't wait for the full game! Higher levels are suuuper chalenging. Soundtrack is so cool and all positive vibes 🙌🙌

Where can I buy the full game? The few levels you can play get boring after a few times. Deff want to buy the full version.

Dawn
One of the best games for working out and to enjoy, best graphics, best environment, best music. Owesome

reviews.review_title: Where can I buy the full game
reviews.review_description: This game is really fun but I cannot find the full game anywhere to buy? Where can I find it?
Wheres the full game at

I can’t wait to be able to buy the full version

Please make it available soon
Cool

This demo has teased the heck outta me; I want more! Was not expecting to like or even enjoy this as much as I have. I needed the full version - like yesterday!   Also, customizable music capability? Please and thank you! Again, REALLY fun game; I love it!
I already own this game on PSVR2 and it feels good on Quest 3, but still the PSVR2 wins in comparison.

reviews.review_title: This is a lot more fun that I imagined!
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game and look forward to the full version. Any timeline?

This demo is by far my favourite workout/rhythm music game.

The music selection is fantastic, the workout intensity progression is well balanced (based on the 4 tracks that are available), and I'm yet to master the highest level.

Can't wait for the release of the full version for even more songs!

developer_response.body: Great news! Game is already out :)

reviews.review_description: I really hope this game come soon.

reviews.review_title: Boxing with a lot of rhythm!
reviews.review_description:
A very polished game with a lot of detail, it's nice to do song after song and be able to see and improve your score.
Looking forward to playing the full game!

the biggest difference between this one & other rhythmic genre is the simplicity, the color combination works perfectly & hope developers will keep it intact . { definitelt they must try different things who knows it will work}

This quickly became my favorite rhythm/ workout game. 
The direct connection of voxel and fist feels amazing. 
Look forward to the full release.
Love this game. Looking forward to the full version. Music is fantastic.
